name: munjanggun-blog
description: 문장군 블로그 SEO 콘텐츠 운영 파이프라인

scripts.check: node --check scripts/track_ranking.js && node --check scripts/analyze_top10.js && node --check scripts/fetch_keyword_data.js && node --check scripts/fetch_keyword_data_product.js && node --check scripts/generate_dashboard.js && node --check scripts/generate_mock_history.js && node --check scripts/validate_post.js && node --check scripts/blog_quality_gate.js && node --check scripts/validate_data_schema.js && node --check scripts/check_freshness.js && node --check scripts/summarize_ranking_changes.js && node --check tests/validate_project_structure.js && node --check tests/validate_automation_rules.js && node --check tests/test_blog_quality_gate.js
scripts.validate: npm run check && node tests/validate_project_structure.js && node tests/validate_automation_rules.js && npm run validate:data && npm run check:freshness && npm run validate:posts && npm run test:blog-gate
scripts.ops:daily: npm run track && npm run dashboard && npm run ranking:summary && npm run check:freshness
